nasb.text: Now he waited seven days, according to the appointed time set by Samuel, but Samuel did not come to Gilgal; and the people were scattering from him.

esv.text: He waited seven days, the time appointed by Samuel. But Samuel did not come to Gilgal, and the people were scattering from him.

cnv.text: 掃羅照著撒母耳所定的日期等了七天，但撒母耳還沒有來到吉甲，眾人就離開掃羅散去了。

ccb.text: 扫罗按着撒母耳所定的日期在吉甲等了七天，可是撒母耳还没有来。扫罗的军兵开始溜走。
